title: Admissions: Interdistrict Transfers
description: Conroe ISD's rules for accepting students who live outside the district are outlined here, including who may apply, under what circumstances transfers are granted, and any conditions that apply. Families seeking to enroll a student who resides in another school district can use this policy to understand the process and eligibility requirements. Knowing these guidelines helps parents plan ahead and sets clear expectations for how the district handles transfer requests.
